sentences.target: Mein Onkel ist Arbeiter in der Fabrik.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n ˈɔŋkl̩ ɪst ˈaʁbaɪ̯tɐ ɪn deːɐ faˈbʁiːk/

translations.de: Mein Onkel ist Arbeiter in der Fabrik.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n ˈɔŋkl̩ ɪst ˈaʁbaɪ̯tɐ ɪn deːɐ faˈbʁiːk/
translations.en: My uncle is a worker in the factory.
translations.es: Mi tío trabaja en la fábrica.
translations.vi: Chú tôi làm việc ở nhà máy.
translations.nl: Mijn oom werkt in de fabriek.
translations.hi: मेरे चाचा फैक्ट्री में काम करते हैं.
translations.el: Ο θείος μου δουλεύει στο εργοστάσιο.
translations.ja: 叔父は工場で働いています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the head noun; agrees with masculine singular nominative 'Onkel' and marks possession.
Head noun; subject of the clause; masculine singular nominative.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate nominal.
Predicate nominal (bare predicative noun) classifying the subject; nominative form after the copula.
Preposition governing the dative here (static location), introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article; feminine singular dative agreeing with 'Fabrik'.
Object of the preposition 'in'; feminine singular dative; denotes location.

sentences.target: Der Arbeiter hilft mir mit dem Regal.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ ˈaʁbaɪ̯tɐ hɪlft miːɐ̯ mɪt deːm ʁeˈɡaːl/

translations.de: Der Arbeiter hilft mir mit dem Regal.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ ˈaʁbaɪ̯tɐ hɪlft miːɐ̯ mɪt deːm ʁeˈɡaːl/
translations.en: The worker is helping me with the shelf.
translations.es: El trabajador me ayuda con la estantería.
translations.it: L'operaio mi aiuta con lo scaffale.
translations.ko: 노동자가 내가 선반을 조립하는 것을 도와준다.
translations.pt: O trabalhador me ajuda com a estante.
translations.tr: İşçi rafı yapmamda bana yardım ediyor.
translations.vi: Người công nhân giúp tôi lắp cái kệ.
translations.nl: De arbeider helpt me met de plank.
translations.hu: A munkás segít nekem a polccal.
translations.hi: मज़दूर मुझे शेल्फ लगाने में मदद कर रहा है.
translations.el: Ο εργάτης με βοηθά με το ράφι.
translations.id: Pekerja itu membantu saya dengan rak.
translations.ja: 作業員が棚のことで手伝ってくれています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; masculine singular nominative agreeing with 'Arbeiter'.
Head noun; subject of the clause; masculine singular nominative.
Finite main verb; selects a dative object for the person being helped.
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular dative; indirect object (beneficiary) of 'hilft'.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a comitative/instrumental phrase.
Definite article; neuter singular dative agreeing with 'Regal'.
Object of 'mit'; neuter singular dative; indicates the thing involved.

sentences.target: Ich frage den Arbeiter nach dem Weg.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə deːn ˈaʁbaɪ̯tɐ naːx deːm veːk/

translations.de: Ich frage den Arbeiter nach dem Weg.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə deːn ˈaʁbaɪ̯tɐ naːx deːm veːk/
translations.en: I ask the worker for directions.
translations.es: Le pregunto al trabajador cómo llegar.
translations.fr: Je demande mon chemin à l'ouvrier.
translations.he: אני שואל את העובד איך להגיע.
translations.vi: Tôi hỏi người công nhân đường đi.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de arbeider de weg.
translations.hi: मैं मजदूर से रास्ता पूछता हूँ.
translations.el: Ρωτάω τον εργάτη πώς να πάω.
translations.ja: 作業員に道を尋ねます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; takes an accusative object (addressee) and a 'nach' + dative prepositional object for the requested information.
Definite article; masculine singular accusative agreeing with 'Arbeiter'.
Direct object (addressee) of 'frage'; masculine singular accusative.
Preposition governing the dative; with 'fragen' indicates what is being asked for.
Definite article; masculine singular dative agreeing with 'Weg'.
Object of 'nach'; masculine singular dative; here meaning directions/route.

sentences.target: Der Arbeiter kommt, aber die Maschine streikt.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ ˈaʁbaɪ̯tɐ kɔmt ˈaːbɐ diː maˈʃiːnə ʃtʁaɪ̯kt/

translations.de: Der Arbeiter kommt, aber die Maschine streikt.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ ˈaʁbaɪ̯tɐ kɔmt ˈaːbɐ diː maˈʃiːnə ʃtʁaɪ̯kt/
translations.en: The worker arrives, but the machine is acting up.
translations.es: El trabajador llega, pero la máquina no funciona.
translations.fr: L'ouvrier arrive, mais la machine ne fonctionne pas.
translations.it: L'operaio arriva, ma la macchina non funziona.
translations.zh-Hans: 工人到了，但机器出了故障。
translations.yue: 工人嚟到，但部機器出咗問題。
translations.pt: O trabalhador chega, mas a máquina está com problemas.
translations.he: העובד מגיע, אבל המכונה עושה בעיות.
translations.tr: İşçi geliyor ama makine arıza çıkarıyor.
translations.vi: Người công nhân đến, nhưng máy đang trục trặc.
translations.nl: De arbeider komt, maar de machine hapert.
translations.uk: Робітник приходить, але машина не працює як слід.
translations.hu: A munkás megérkezik, de a gép rakoncátlankodik.
translations.hi: मज़दूर आता है, लेकिन मशीन गड़बड़ कर रही है.
translations.el: Ο εργάτης έρχεται, αλλά το μηχάνημα δεν λειτουργεί σωστά.
translations.id: Pekerja itu datang, tapi mesinnya bermasalah.
translations.ro: Muncitorul sosește, dar mașina face figuri.
translations.ja: 作業員が到着するが、機械の調子が悪い。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; masculine singular nominative agreeing with 'Arbeiter'.
Head noun; subject of the first clause; masculine singular nominative.
Finite intransitive main verb indicating arrival/motion toward the deictic center.
Coordinating conjunction linking two main clauses in contrast.
Definite article; feminine singular nominative agreeing with 'Maschine'.
Head noun; subject of the second clause; feminine singular nominative.
Finite intransitive main verb; used also for machines meaning 'to go on strike, malfunction'.
